---
id: rollback-profile
title: "Rollback to a previous version"
description: "Restores a previous Profile revision. Creates a new version entry pointing to the old snapshot."
sidebar_label: "Rollback to a previous version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/transform-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Rollback to a previous version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/profiles/{profileId}/rollback"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Restores a previous Profile revision. Creates a new version entry pointing to the old snapshot.

  as={"h2"}
